clamps: TAU_CELL calibrated to 0.000947 (<= 0.01), which would admit a near-identical in-cell clone; clamped up to the documented minimum

derivation.tau_cell: observed same-cell minimum structural_distance (design 4.6, OQ-3), clamped to <= TAU_STRUCT
derivation.tau_state: anti-no-op floor min(0.5, min_cross_tier2_state_distance/2), clamped to >= 0.25 (design 5.4)
derivation.tau_struct: 25th percentile of same-cell hand-authored structural_distance pairs (design 4.6, OQ-3)
